verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: This is your house, father come and dwell This is your house, a holy house of prayer Where the lost and the lonely, bring their burdens and their cares This is your house, this is your house come and dwell. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We dedicate this temple to you Lord Let your glory come and fill this sanctuary Yes be inproned upon the praises of your people Lord we agree, in unity.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This is your house, father come and dwell This is your house, a holy house of prayer Where the lost and the lonely, bring their burdens and their cares This is your house, this is your house come and dwell.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy Spirit overflow this place Come and fill this walls with grace and mercy Both healing and redemption, find searching souls Lord have your way, we humbly pray.
